Our commitment to primes Reply within 1 business day NDA on first substantive contact Subcontract under your terms Zero agency-facing engagements
SLED intake

Talk to us about a subcontract role.

Capture managers, BD leads, and program managers at U.S. primes only. We reply within one business day with a mutual NDA template and a 30-minute calendar slot. No public materials are exchanged before the NDA is signed.

Section 01
About you
Section 02
About the engagement
Section 03
What you'd like from us
All fields are confidential. NDA on request before review.

Your inquiry is ready to send.

Your email client should have opened a pre-filled message to sled@techtiz.co. If it didn't, copy your details into an email to that address — we reply within one business day with a mutual NDA template.

Submit another inquiry
What happens next

Three steps. Two of them are ours.

01
Within 1 business day We confirm receipt and reply with a mutual NDA template and a calendar slot for the capability conversation.
02
Week 1 to 2 · under NDA 30 to 60 minute capability conversation. You describe the engagement; we describe the team shape and contracting structure.
03
Week 2 to 4 If the engagement fits, we deliver a scoped statement of work, teaming letter draft, and named-resume options for your contracts team.
Or skip the form

Email the SLED desk directly.

If you'd rather start with a short email, send a one-line description of the engagement type and your role. Our U.S.-based partner manager routes it from there, usually within one business day.

sled@techtiz.co

An AI-native engineering studio building adaptive systems for ambitious teams.
